posts.author: graylynn (graylynn)
posts.cookedHtml:
requesting a new in dashboard notification flow that triggers when automations fail

if automation fails when email gets disconnected, monday user can’t be notified via email about this problem. additionally, there is no option to be notified in monday dashboard when automation fails.

how is a user supposed to know when an automation fails if no failsafe email or monday notification is set up?
